Enabling Remote Workers and Ensuring Business Continuity

Video Conferencing – Messaging – Phones – Call Center – Mobility

Get a Quote

Robust Collaboration Solutions

All through a Single Pane of Glass

The PREMHost Collaboration Suite maximizes productivity by delivering all its services through a single interface for one low price.

Video Collaboration

Real-time collaboration with colleagues across the world through face-to-face virtual meetings, video messaging, and multi-user conferencing.

Digital Receptionist

Eliminate the need for a live attendant and offer callers easy, self-help options.

Call Park

Easy one-button access to callers on hold at any phone.

HD Quality Voice and Video – Guaranteed

PREMHost’s Session Border Controllers solve network problems before they occur.

Voicemail

Review transcripts of your voicemails in email, or with our Web Client, Desktop or smartphone app. Never listen to a voicemail again!

Mobile Applications

Built-in tunneling to avoid remote firewall issues, so calling over 4G or Wi-Fi is seamless and reliable.

Simple to Use Collaboration – Everywhere.

Simple to Deploy

Whether you are managing multiple domains or configuring specific settings, myEPP provides a user-friendly interface for effortless management. Keep your domain secure with reliable access through the EPP login system.

Designed to be Simple

Simple to use. Simple to deploy. Powerful for your business.

Totally Secure

EPP (Extensible Provisioning Protocol) is a crucial tool for domain registration and management. Whether you’re using myEPP or the EPP login portal, accessing your domain account is simple and secure.

Affordably Priced

With my EPP login, users can easily manage their domain settings and configurations. To initiate the process, simply navigate to the EPP log in page and enter your credentials.

Success Stories

See Why Our Customers Choose Digital Future

I highly recommend Digital Future if you are looking to change or add a new phone system. We have had our system for about 4 years and it has not only saved money but is providing additional functions that have made doing business easier. It is a great option if you have remote users. Any time we have needed changes or had concerns we received excellent service and prompt attention from the Digital Future team. Not only do they service your phones, they monitor your internet service to assure quality calls.

Joan Cotham

General Manager

HK Surgical, Inc.

The Digital Future Team has been wonderful to work with. They are knowledgeable, professional and responsive to all of our company's needs.

Controller

Digital Future is responsive and dedicated to giving the best service possible, we highly recommend them.

Lisa Locke

Success Stories

See Why Our Customers Choose Digital Future

Digital Future is by far my favorite vendor to work with. Their response time is fantastic. They handle changes and issues quickly and efficiently. During the early days of the COVID-19 pandemic, they helped our company transition much of our workforce to home without missing a beat. I highly recommend them for all of your communication services needs.

Monica Szychulda

Senior Business Systems Analyst
